overview: A responsive diagnostic center platform where patients access their test reports and book appointments with doctors, while admins manage all patient records, upload diagnostic reports, and track report delivery status.
features: Patient and admin authentication with role-based access
Admin patient record management with search and filter
Diagnostic report upload and assignment using secure cloud storage
Report status tracking (pending, uploaded, sent, viewed)
In-app PDF report viewing and downloading for patients
Doctor profile management with availability scheduling
Appointment booking system with specialization search
Patient dashboard with quick access to reports and appointments
Fully responsive layout for mobile, tablet, and desktop
